markdown:
# Vehicle & Traffic Law
## Title 4
#### Article 17
##### § 499 — Definition

For the purposes of this article “metropolitan commuter transportation district” shall mean the area of the state included in the district created and governed by Public Authorities Law § 1262 (Metropolitan commuter transportation district) .

*Last modified: Sep. 22, 2014*
